title: schollera
intro: Schollera is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the orange family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Schollera include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Schollera is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal remedies.
